raw_consumer_statement:
In a prior case I filed arising from this ordeal, which originated on XX/XX/year>, you asked American Express to return my interest on the nearly {$40000.00} they retained. Not only did they not do that, but they are also still refusing to return my money. They are altering dates to fulfill their narrative. I have the correct dates and have copied all correspondence. They are using new dates to continue withholding my funds, as well as interest ( now higher ) from a young XXXX XXXX 
I thought there were laws against keeping money for more than 92 days. Please can you help me? When I contact them, they say, " Yes, we'll mail the check, '' but they never send any correspondence or a check. As a vulnerable member of society, they are XXXX XXXX XXXX me, their own customer, which may lead me into bankruptcy.
